service.name: PAN
service.description: PAN — Personal AI Network. Persistent intelligence layer.

env.name: PATH
env.value: C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Users\tzuri\bin;C:\Python313\Scripts;C:\Python313;C:\Program Files (x86)\Razer Chroma SDK\bin;C:\Program Files\Razer Chroma SDK\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Razer\ChromaBroadcast\bin;C:\Program Files\Razer\ChromaBroadcast\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH;C:\Program Files\dotnet;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\Tailscale;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Windows\system32\config\systemprofile\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Python312;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA app\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\SoundSwitch;C:\Users\tzuri\AppData\Local\Muse Hub\lib;C:\Program Files\nodejs;C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\Windows Performance Toolkit;C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI;C:\Users\tzuri\.local\bin;C:\Users\tzuri\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\tzuri\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Python312;C:\Python312\Scripts;C:\Users\tzuri\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;C:\Users\tzuri\AppData\Local\PowerToys\DSCModules;C:\Program Files\Airshipper;C:\Users\tzuri\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\tzuri\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\Gyan.FFmpeg_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\ffmpeg-8.0.1-full_build\bin
